arts.ttl: Club ‘can quickly stop’ Tottenham signing player in January – Postecoglou’s side have ‘no say’
arts.sum: On Tuesday, we covered a claim from Spain which stated Tottenham Hotspur had sent an official to Real Betis to closely monitor Vitor Roque. It was also said the north London club have asked for information about the striker. arts.ttl: Son Spurs issue, transfer move and the issues Postecoglou must solve in 2025
arts.sum: To make it a successful season for all concerned, Postecoglou and Spurs have issues they need to address in the new year. It is definitely one thing that Postecoglou and Tottenham need to solve come the turn of the year.
